[4/14, 11:02 AM] Justin Massion: You do not need to spend time posing them, unless it only takes 1 minute.

I'll analyze the provided images first to understand the characters, platform, and task card elements you're working with.

artifact.description:
**Visual Style:** Miniature, diorama-like, clean, studio photography with bright white background.
**Characters:** Three miniature business figures (two males, one female) in professional attire. Male 1: grey suit, red tie. Male 2: navy jacket, light shirt, grey trousers. Female: navy skirt suit. They stand upright, facing forward, arranged in a line on the platform.
**Platform Design:** White, rounded rectangular prism resembling a stylized Google search bar. Features include a "G" logo, text input field with placeholder "Where Can I Contact with CreativDex?", a microphone icon, and a camera icon.
**Task Card Appearance:** Translucent, rectangular card floating above and to the right of the platform. It has a "TASK ASSIGNMENT CARD" header and three labeled, blank fields: "PROJECT", "ASSIGNED TO", and "STATUS".
**Layout Relationship:** The three characters are positioned centrally on top of the platform. The task card floats independently adjacent to the platform on the right side.

**Visual Style:** 3D rendered, minimalist aesthetic with light colors and simple geometric shapes. Characters are semi-realistic 3D models.
**Characters:** Three distinct adult figures: a man in a business suit (left), a man in casual attire (middle), and a woman in business casual attire (right). All are standing figures with slightly stiff, posed postures.
**Platform Design:** A light grey, elongated rectangular 3D block with rounded edges, serving as a base. It features embossed text "Where Can I Contact with CreativeDex?" on its front face.
**Task Card Appearance:** A white rectangular card with rounded corners and a dark grey border. It is positioned to the right of the characters and platform, seemingly floating. The card has bolded text "TASK ASSIGNMENT CARD" and placeholders for "PROJECT:", "ASSIGNED TO:", and "STATUS:". The font is a clear, sans-serif type.

text:
Perfect! I can see the elements clearly. Now I understand your vision - you want to create a **10-image storyboard progression** showing these 3 characters evolving through different work stages on their platform(s), from "We need jobs" to a full workflow system.

## Execution Plan:

**Story Arc (10 Images):**
1. **"We Need Jobs"** - 3 characters on platform, empty/blank task cards overhead
2. **Getting Started** - Characters at individual desk setups, task cards show "Get Jobs"
3. **Job Search** - Guy at desk with search-related objects, card shows job hunting tasks
4. **Proposal Design** - Girl at desk with design tools, card shows proposal work
5. **Client Relations** - Business person at desk with communication setup, card shows relationship tasks
6. **Collaboration Begins** - Multiple platforms, characters working in proximity
7. **Project Workflow** - More complex setup with interconnected workstations
8. **Team Coordination** - Advanced platform with shared resources
9. **Scaling Up** - Larger, more sophisticated multi-platform environment
10. **Full Operation** - Complex ecosystem showing complete workflow integration

I'll hand this off to the image sub agent to create this progression maintaining your character designs, platform style, and clean 3D aesthetic.

text:
Perfect! 🎮✨ I've created a **10-image diegetic tutorial system** where all UI and interface elements exist as physical or holographic objects within the characters' world!

## Diegetic Worktree Evolution Created:

**Phase 1 - Discovery (Images 1-3):**
- **Physical Worktree Monument**: Characters contemplate a real tree-like structure showing three future paths
- **Interactive Hologram Table**: Characters touch and manipulate a 3D holographic worktree projection
- **Branching Crossroads**: Three actual physical pathways diverge with themed environments

**Phase 2 - Path Exploration (Images 4-6):**
- **Space Path**: Characters walk through space-themed environment with holographic AI guide and physical mission displays
- **AI Path**: Neural network sculptures and holographic AI teacher in a physical computing room
- **Metaverse Path**: VR headsets and portals showing physical-digital hybrid reality

**Phase 3 - Time & Training (Images 7-9):**
- **Time Branching Chamber**: Circular room with spiral timeline and portal doorways to futures
- **Multi-Path Observatory**: Windows showing all three futures simultaneously with physical control console
- **Training Arena**: Physical facility with three zones for hands-on skill development

**Phase 4 - Convergence (Image 10):**
- **Unified Nexus**: All paths merge into one integrated platform with space, AI, and metaverse elements combined

## Key Diegetic Features:
✅ **No floating 2D UI** - everything exists in-world  
✅ **Characters interact physically** with holograms, screens, and controls  
✅ **Tutorial elements are environmental** - signs, displays, holographic guides  
✅ **Dead Space/Minority Report style** - interfaces you can touch and see in 3D space

  <prompt>Create a video showing the characters walking through all 10 stages of the diegetic tutorial system</prompt>
</suggestion>

</suggestion>

</suggestion>
```

text:
Perfect! 🎮✨ I've created a **crystal-clear diegetic tutorial progression** showing the complete journey from nothing to mastery!

## Tutorial Progression Created:

**🌱 BEGINNING (Images 1-3):**
- **Empty Screen** → **Agents Created (LVL 0)** → **First Job Board (LVL 1, $0)**
- Tutorial teaches: How to start, create agents, find first job

**💼 EARLY GAME (Images 4-6):**
- **Job In Progress** → **First Complete! (LVL 2, $100)** → **Equipment Upgrade ($50 spent)**
- Tutorial teaches: Complete tasks, earn money, invest in better tools

**📈 MID GAME (Images 7-9):**
- **Multiple Jobs (LVL 5, $2,500)** → **Team Collaboration (LVL 6, $10K)** → **Automation (LVL 8, $50K + passive income)**
- Tutorial teaches: Scale up, work together, automate routine tasks

**🚀 ADVANCED (Images 10-12):**
- **Worktree Unlocked (LVL 10, $250K)** → **Multi-Path Mastery (LVL 15, $1M)** → **Full System (LVL 20+, $10M+)**
- Tutorial teaches: Choose evolution paths, specialize, achieve infinite progression

## Key Diegetic Elements:
✅ **All UI exists in-world**: Holograms, physical screens, floating displays  
✅ **Clear progression metrics**: Levels, money, jobs completed  
✅ **Cause & effect visible**: Work → Money → Upgrades → Better Work  
✅ **Platform evolves physically** as players progress  
✅ **Characters interact** with every interface element  

This is a complete game tutorial that visually teaches the entire system! 🎯

text:
Excellent! 🎯 I've recreated the **complete diegetic tutorial using only physical 3D objects** - no holograms!

## What Changed:

**❌ REMOVED:**
- All holograms → Replaced with physical LED displays, monitors, signs
- "CreativeDex" branding → Replaced with contextually relevant text
- Google branding → Clean, unbranded platforms

**✅ NOW USING:**
- **Physical LED displays** for levels, currency, counters
- **Actual monitors/screens** for tutorial messages
- **Physical task cards** (like index cards on desks)
- **LED light strips** for progress bars
- **Physical signs and plaques** for achievements
- **Tangible objects**: robots, furniture, boards, gauges
- **Real 3D elements**: job board kiosks, skill tree posters, achievement walls

## Tutorial Flow (12 Stages):

**🌱 Start:** Empty platform → Agents created → First job board  
**💼 Early:** Active tasks → First completion → Equipment upgrades  
**📈 Mid:** Multiple jobs → Team collaboration → Automation systems  
**🚀 Advanced:** Worktree unlocked → Multi-path mastery → Full system ($10M+)

Everything is now **tangible and physical** - characters interact with real objects in their 3D world. The progression is clear through visible changes in the physical environment: more equipment, bigger platforms, LED counters increasing, physical robots appearing, etc.

  <label>Show failure states</label>

</suggestion>

  <label>Different agent types</label>
  <prompt>Show tutorial with different character combinations and specializations</prompt>
</suggestion>

  <label>Speed run progression</label>
  <prompt>Show the fastest possible path from level 0 to level 20 with optimal strategies</prompt>
</suggestion>
```
